import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -current)
        else
          result = list.push(result, current)
        end
        current = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -current)
    else
      result = list.push(result, current)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut placed = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        y
      when None
        0
    end
    if not placed
      if v == x
        result = list.push(result, x)
        placed = true
      else if v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, x)
        placed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    else
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not placed
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
  end
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  mut u: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let x = match a.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        y
      when None
        0
    end
    u = insert_unique(u, x)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < b.len()
    let x = match b.get(j)
      when Some(y)
        y
      when None
        0
    end
    u = insert_unique(u, x)
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < u.len()
    let x = match u.get(k)
      when Some(y)
        y
      when None
        0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
